candidate_definition_hints.text: Reverse Instructions to generate instruction tuning data with corpus examples

The LongForm dataset is created by leveraging English corpus examples with the **reverse instructions** method. We select a diverse set of human-written documents from existing corpora such as C4 and Wikipedia and generate instructions for the given documents via LLMs. Then, we …
